summary: Replayed ADR 0210 from the latest origin/main-derived worktree, converted the live ops portal publication surface to the canonical publication contract, fixed the runtime packaging regression exposed by the first replay, and verified the committed branch state end to end on docker-runtime-lv3.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with-requirements requirements/ops-portal.txt python -m pytest -q tests/test_subdomain_exposure_audit.py tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py` passed with `28 passed in 0.64s`.
`uvx --from pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --check-registry --validate` passed from commit `343f9028531a503815f156cbad54f17ebff3aeb3`.

`ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml -e ansible_ssh_private_key_file=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 playbooks/ops-portal.yml` completed with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=99 changed=0 failed=0` after the packaging fix landed in the committed branch state.
`curl -sf http://10.10.10.20:8092/health` returned `{"status":"ok"}` and `/partials/overview` rendered canonical publication labels including `ops.lv3.org · operator · shared-edge · platform-sso`.

`uvx --from pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --check-registry --include-live-dns --include-http-auth --include-tls --include-hetzner-zone --print-report-json --write-receipt` completed successfully and wrote `receipts/subdomain-exposure-audit/20260328T113654Z.json` with `CRITICAL=7` and `WARN=1` pre-existing drift findings.

notes: The first branch-local replay failed before the platform was healthy because the ops portal image did not copy `publication_contract.py`; the follow-up fix added that `COPY` line to the role Dockerfile template and the exact-commit replay then succeeded idempotently.

The first manual replay attempt also required explicitly setting `ansible_ssh_private_key_file=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519` because Ansible did not select the repo SSH identity automatically through the proxmox jump path.

The live publication audit findings recorded in `receipts/subdomain-exposure-audit/20260328T113654Z.json` are outside the direct scope of ADR 0210 and document pre-existing TLS and DNS governance drift rather than regressions introduced by the canonical publication model change.
The integrated `main` release now consumes this verified live-apply receipt as the canonical ADR 0210 evidence while recording repo version `0.177.35` and platform version `0.130.37`.
